creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
You are right: when I created this port long time ago, it was only a dependency of french/aster, but nowadays Code_Aster has been localized, and these ports should be repo-moved to science (added in my TODO list).

Fun fact:
$ file /usr/ports/french/med/pkg-descr
/usr/ports/french/med/pkg-descr: MED_Song
